name: Sour Liquor Aroma
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

Skills that apply(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count gain 'Offense Level' +2

If the main target has [Vibration] and is Staggered, deal +(Stagger Level x 7.5)% damage with the Skill

When attacking an enemy with a Skill that applies [Vibration] Potency or Count, deal +(Stagger Level x 15)% damage with the Skill instead

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, <style="upgradeHighlight">and #3</style> Deployed Identities]

Skills that apply(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count gain 'Offense Level' +2

If the main target has [Vibration] and is Staggered, deal +(Stagger Level x <style="upgradeHighlight">10</style>)% damage with the Skill

When attacking an enemy with a Skill that applies [Vibration] Potency or Count, deal +(Stagger Level x <style="upgradeHighlight">20</style>)% damage with the Skill instead

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

Skills that apply(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count gain Offense Level <style="upgradeHighlight">+3</style>

If the main target has [Vibration] and is Staggered, deal +(Stagger Level x <style="upgradeHighlight">12.5</style>)% damage with the Skill

When attacking an enemy with a Skill that applies [Vibration] Potency or Count, deal +(Stagger Level x <style="upgradeHighlight">25</style>)% damage with the Skill instead
